The Dragon's Blood Tree (Dracaena draco) is a succulent tree native to the Canary Islands, known for its bright red sap, which has been used for centuries as a natural remedy. The health benefits of Dracaena draco include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of the plant include anthraquinones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
